narrative: RBA rate hike to 4.35% and Trump comments on Iran negotiations drive price action — AUD/USD firms to 0.7191 as the -60bp Fed-RBA carry disadvantage narrows; gold higher +0.84% near $4,572 as geopolitical risk premiums offset a steady DXY +0.05%. USD/JPY bids to 157.81 on 300bp carry; equities +0.80%; VIX 17.4. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
